marketHeadlines.headline: Tesla deliveries jump 25% over last year, blowing past expectations - CNBC
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: A blowout delivery number reframes the Tesla story away from margin compression and back to volume — material for the Q2 print narrative and any TSLA gap at the open.

marketHeadlines.headline: (TSLA) Tesla Vehicle Sales Climb 25%, Far Exceeding Analyst Estimates - Bloomberg
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Bloomberg's confirmation of the 25% beat gives the print institutional weight — likely the dominant TSLA catalyst going into the holiday-shortened session.

marketHeadlines.headline: PLTR Stock Rises Premarket – This Analyst Called Palantir A 'Gift' For Investors Ahead of Independence Day - TradingView
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Street framing Palantir as a pre-holiday 'gift' is a sentiment tell — buy-the-dip narrative is back after a 14% drawdown over the past year.

marketHeadlines.headline: PLTR Stock Rises Premarket – This Analyst Called Palantir A 'Gift' For Investors Ahead of Independence Day - Stocktwits
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Duplicate of the TradingView piece across Stocktwits — the 'gift' framing is spreading, which is itself a sentiment signal worth a beat.

marketHeadlines.headline: Meta's Inevitable Cloud - Spyglass
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Sell-side re-framing Meta as a cloud story (not just ads) keeps the META re-rating thesis alive; watch for AI-capex commentary on the next earnings call.

creatorIntel.sentimentNote: Creator coverage is light overnight; pre-holiday tape is keeping most YouTube desks quiet, with the TSLA print as the lone consensus catalyst.

aiRace.headline: What Happens When AI Stops Answering and Starts Handling Healthcare Tasks? - MedCity News
aiRace.whyItMatters: Signals the shift from LLM Q&A to agentic healthcare workflows — meaningful for the long-tail thesis that vertical AI tools will out-generalize horizontal ones.

aiRace.headline: Weird Al Yankovic Pulled Out of AI Ad Despite Offer to Make a 'Nice Pile of Money': 'I Can't Be the Poster Boy for AI' - Variety
aiRace.whyItMatters: A high-profile creative opting out is a small but real signal of the talent-side AI backlash shaping the next ad-cycle narrative.

aiRace.headline: Could AI undermine our (belief in the truth of) scientific theories? - Chemistry World
aiRace.whyItMatters: Epistemology-flavored AI skepticism piece — slow-burn relevance to research-lab procurement, not a near-term market mover.

aiRace.headline: Job Openings Rise Again. Is AI Creating Jobs, Not Destroying Them? - 24/7 Wall St.
aiRace.whyItMatters: Counter-narrative to the AI-displaces-workers story — useful datapoint ahead of next week's JOLTS print.

supplement: IB June 2026 activity statement is in the inbox — glance at it for any new fees or dividend events.

personalInbox.subject: Live War Room session starting soon - login now!

health.move: Take a 10-min walk before the TSLA open — Friday tape is going to be thin and reactive.
